title: no scope for verilog dpi export

features.name: dpi_c_task_export_with_string_param
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C task export with an input string parameter
features.snippet:
export "DPI-C" task initmem;
task initmem(input string file);

features.name: dpi_export_with_readmemh
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C exported task that calls $readmemh system function

features.name: c_call_dpi_export_with_svGetScopeFromName
features.description: Code should include C++ calling a DPI exported function after svSetScope with svGetScopeFromName
